inputs.label: Machine Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the equipment in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the equipment in years.

inputs.label: Downtime Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the last shutdown/downtime in hours.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the last shutdown/downtime in hours.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son kapatma/arıza süresinin saat cinsinden süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer des letzten Stillstands/Ausfalls in Stunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du dernier arrêt/temps d'arrêt en heures.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de la última parada/tiempo de inactividad en horas.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient temperature at restart time in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ambient temperature at restart time in degrees Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden başlatma sırasındaki ortam sıcaklığı (Santigrat derece).
businessContext_i18n.de: Umgebungstemperatur zum Zeitpunkt des Neustarts in Grad Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température ambiante au moment du redémarrage en degrés Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura ambiente al momento del reinicio en grados Celsius.

inputs.label: Cold Starts per Day
inputs.businessContext: Average number of cold starts per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of cold starts per day.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de démarrages à froid par jour.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número promedio de arranques en frío por día.

inputs.label: Severity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Company-specific multiplier to adjust severity (e.g., based on equipment criticality).

businessContext_i18n.en: Company-specific multiplier to adjust severity (e.g., based on equipment criticality).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şiddeti ayarlamak için şirkete özgü çarpan (ör. ekipman kritikliğine göre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Unternehmensspezifischer Multiplikator zur Anpassung des Schweregrads (z.B. basierend auf der Kritikalität der Anlage).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur spécifique à l'entreprise pour ajuster la sévérité (par exemple, basé sur la criticité de l'équipement).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador específico de la empresa para ajustar la severidad (ej., basado en la criticidad del equipo).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
